meta.title: AgroVeda Storage Directory
meta.description: Curated starter directory of crop storage and cold storage facilities for farmer discovery.
meta.note: This is a curated manual directory because a reliable nationwide open API with facility-level contacts was not available.

locations.name: Nashik Fresh Cold Storage
locations.description: Suitable for fruits, vegetables, and short-term pre-market cold chain needs.

locations.name: Pune Agri Warehouse Hub
locations.description: General warehousing for grains and pulses with loading support and dispatch scheduling.

locations.name: Indore Harvest Cold Chain
locations.address: Dewas Naka Industrial Zone, Indore, Madhya Pradesh
locations.description: Cold-chain facility focused on horticulture produce and mandi-linked dispatch.

locations.name: Ludhiana Grain Storage Center
locations.description: High-volume storage for cereals and oilseeds with grading and bagging support.

locations.name: Jaipur Produce Cold Store
locations.address: Sikar Road Agri Belt, Jaipur, Rajasthan
locations.description: Focused on perishables with sorting and dispatch coordination.

locations.name: Bengaluru Farm Logistics Storage
locations.address: Hoskote Agro Logistics Cluster, Bengaluru, Karnataka
locations.description: Mixed storage zones for fresh produce and dry commodities with local market access.

locations.name: Hyderabad Green Preserve
locations.description: Storage and dispatch support for fruits, vegetables, and short-term dairy handling.

locations.name: Kolkata Agri Storage Point
locations.address: Dankuni Freight Corridor, Kolkata, West Bengal
locations.description: Regional storage hub for eastern India with bulk commodity movement support.
